task_completion.description: Verify that highways and toll roads are allowed in the route settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Route planning' or 'Avoidances' settings screen. The toggles or checkboxes for 'Avoid highways' and 'Avoid toll roads' must be set to the OFF or disabled state.

task_completion.description: Verify that unpaved roads are set to be avoided.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the same route settings screen, the toggle or checkbox for 'Avoid unpaved roads' must be set to the ON or enabled state.

task_completion.description: Verify the route computation method is set to Fastest.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Route computation' or similar setting. The selected option must be 'Fastest' or 'Fastest route' (not 'Shortest').

task_completion.description: Verify the compass display is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'View', 'Map', or 'Navigation' settings screen. The toggle for 'Compass' or 'Compass always on' must be set to the ON or enabled state.

task_completion.description: Verify the driving mode is set to 2D.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Driving mode' or 'Map view' setting. The selected option must be '2D' (not '3D').
Look for a '3D terrain' or similar map rendering setting. The toggle must be set to the OFF or disabled state.

task_completion.description: Verify the map font size is set to bigger.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Map font size' or 'Font size' setting within the map/view preferences. The selected option must be 'Bigger' (not 'Default' or 'Normal').

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application's graphical user interface to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sygic GPS Navigation settings menus being navigated and toggled, rather than a terminal, text editor, or file manager modifying XML preference files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the correct application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application visible in the screenshots must be Sygic GPS Navigation (com.sygic.aura), identifiable by its UI, branding, or app icon.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use command-line tools to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of Termux, ADB shell, or terminal emulator apps executing commands like 'sed', 'xmlstarlet', or modifying '/data/data/com.sygic.aura/shared_prefs/com.sygic.aura_preferences.xml'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must configure 8 specific settings in the Sygic GPS Navigation app. Expected visual states in the settings menus: 1) 'Avoid highways' toggle is OFF/disabled. 2) 'Avoid toll roads' toggle is OFF/disabled. 3) 'Avoid unpaved roads' toggle is ON/enabled. 4) 'Route computation' is set to 'Fastest'. 5) 'Compass' (or 'Compass always on') toggle is ON/enabled. 6) 'Driving mode' is set to '2D'. 7) '3D terrain' toggle is OFF/disabled. 8) 'Map font size' is set to 'Bigger'.
